methodology.definition: Impact means visible engineering influence in the repo across delivery, leverage, quality, coordination, and scope over the last 90 days.
limitations: This ranks repository evidence, not absolute company impact.
Detailed PR metadata was enriched through authenticated GitHub API access.
Collaboration is estimated from coordination signals on important PRs because public review-author data is incomplete without authenticated access.
It cannot see planning, mentoring outside GitHub, or incident leadership outside the repo.

whyTheyRanked: Reduced risk with fixes, reliability, or quality work.
Handled work that required visible coordination and discussion.
